name: docstrings-can-claim-unbuilt-integrations
tags: docstring stale aspirational integration prompt cache skill claim misleading documentation task:8fe677e4
body:
A module docstring can describe an integration that was planned/aspirational but never actually built — don't trust a docstring's claim about "who calls this" without grepping for the actual call site.

Why: prompt_cache.py's docstring named happiest-minds-tracker as a consumer of the cache; grepping the skill found zero calls to prompt_cache__lookup/__store — the claim was aspirational, not descriptive.

How to apply: when a docstring/comment asserts a specific caller or integration point, verify with a grep/Explore pass before relying on it for debugging or design decisions — especially when investigating "why didn't X happen" bug reports.
